title: Athleta — Wellness Your Way
summary: Creative direction for a wellness-led brand story: simple, motivating, and built for real life—not performance theater.
engagement: Led strategic and creative framing for how the brand shows up around wellness: language, visual rhythm, and campaign ideas that feel human and shareable.

title: Grey Goose — Rebrand exploration
summary: Exploring how a modern premium spirit brand could evolve its story and visual language without losing what made it iconic.
engagement: Creative direction across positioning, narrative architecture, and design language—balancing heritage, craft, and contemporary culture.

title: Bad Bunny × Apple Music × Snap
summary: A cultural partnership moment connecting artist, streaming, and social—built to feel native to fans, not like another promo layer.
engagement: Creative direction for framing, messaging, and experiential beats that keep the idea legible while still feeling loud and fun.
